properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When the mountain looks so tall You′re faith seems so small Your back's against the wall There′s a God above Who's looking down in love, He's always been faithful and true!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He is a friend who sticks closer than a brother And He knows your pain like no other! So don′t be afraid, Step out in Faith And call upon His name!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God′s still faithful In the midst of it all He's faithful! When the earth beneath your feet Gives way in defeat He′s faithful!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When it's just too much for you And you don′t know what to do God will carry you through! When hope is all gone AND you've no strength to go on God′s still FAITHFUL!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh now FAITHFUL is He, When your faith is weak And you've lost all your peace When your whole world is shattered Nothing else matters Life just doesn't mean anything

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: God′s a present help In your time of trouble When everything around you has crumbled He will never change He will will remain forever the same!

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oh… God′s still faithful! It the midst of it all He's faithful! When the earth beneath your feet Gives way in defeat He′s faithful (oh yes He is)

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: When it's just too much for you And you don′t know what to do God will carry you through When hope is all gone And you've no strength to hold on

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: God′s still faithful! When it's just too much for you And you don't know what to do God will carry you through When hope is all gone And you′ve no strength to hold on GOD′S STILL FAITHFUL!!'
